---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for an xPlugins plugin
title: "[FEATURE] <plugin name> - Short description"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs triage"]
assignees: ["jn_willfrydev"]
---

# ✨ Feature Request

> **Before submitting**, please make sure you have:
> - [ ] Searched existing issues and discussions to avoid duplicates
> - [ ] Checked the plugin's latest version — the feature may already exist

---

## 📦 Plugin Information

| Field           | Details                        |
|-----------------|--------------------------------|
| **Plugin Name** | <!-- e.g. xLogin, xJumPads --> |
| **Plugin Version** | <!-- e.g. 1.2.3 -->         |
| **Minecraft Version** | <!-- e.g. 1.21.1 -->    |
| **Server Software** | <!-- Paper / Folia / Spigot / Bukkit / Purpur --> |

---

## 💡 Feature Description

### What feature are you requesting?
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->


### What problem does it solve?
<!-- Explain why this feature would be useful. What pain point does it address? -->


### Describe the solution you'd like
<!-- How do you envision this feature working? Be as detailed as possible. -->


---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->


---

## 📋 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or examples here. -->


---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for duplicate feature requests
- [ ] I have clearly described the feature and its use case
- [ ] This feature is specific to an xPlugins plugin

---

> 💬 Want to discuss this idea first? Join our [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/mNdxNVx6cU) and share it in the suggestions channel.
